title: orobus angulatus
intro: Orobus angulatus, also known as the Angle-leafed Crowfoot or Angle-leaved Crowfoot, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and stomach cramps. Orobus angulatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
